body.title: Make --1m the default and retire session-reuse (always-fresh conversation); drop the --new flag
body.intention: I intend that bin/superclaude and bin/rescueclaude launch with the 1M context window AND a fresh conversation by DEFAULT — because --1m is validated-in-production (Akien: 'used it for some time, love it with auto-compact-at-threshold') and the reasons for reusing/resuming named sessions are gone — so the operator gets max-context + clean-slate without passing any flag.
body.description:
Akien 2026-07-03: 'make --1m --new the defaults for superclaude and rescueclaude' — then refined to: --1m becomes the default, and --new is REMOVED entirely (sessions are always fresh, so the flag is redundant). Follow-on to T-launcher-help-and-1m-flags (which shipped --1m as opt-in, off-by-default; now validated and being promoted to default).

**Two default flips + one removal:**
(1) --1m DEFAULT: default ANTHROPIC_MODEL=opus[1m] in both launchers. PRESERVE an inverse escape (e.g. --200k / --no-1m) that unsets it back to the 200K window — the 200K-vs-1M forgetfulness A/B lever from T-launcher-help-and-1m-flags must survive the default-flip, not be destroyed (do-it-right: flip the default, keep the lever).
(2) Always-fresh conversation: retire claude-conversation REUSE/RESUME. A launch always starts a fresh conversation (no --continue / no resume-picker). Akien: 'the whole reason for reusing sessions has been removed.'
(3) Remove --new: bin/rescueclaude's --new flag (start-fresh-instead-of-resume) is redundant once fresh is unconditional — delete the flag + its help text.

**⚠ CRITICAL — fresh-conversation ≠ unnamed-tmux. DO NOT touch CC_TMUX_SESSION.** The tmux SESSION NAMING is load-bearing in 6+ readers: instance identity (skills/context-load/run, skills/savestate/run), Granny worker routing (unseen_university/devices/granny/cc_worker_listener.py), LOUD notif delivery (unseen_university/notification_dispatcher.py, unseen_university/system_alarm_notifier.py), instance resolution (unseen_university/devices/claude/constants.py). The change is ONLY about the claude *conversation* (no --continue/resume history); the tmux session name CC_TMUX_SESSION must still be set and still resolve CC.0/CC.1. Verify context-load Step 0 availability-restore and Granny routing still work after the change.

**Affected files:** bin/superclaude, bin/rescueclaude. (Root superclaude/superclaude.ps1 are already thin bin/ pass-throughs — no change needed there.)
**Design rules:** none apply (bash launcher scripts; no memory-shape, persistence, or sqlite). delete-after-merge: remove --new flag + help text once fresh is unconditional.
**Scope boundary:** IN — --1m default + inverse escape flag; always-fresh conversation; remove --new; PRESERVE CC_TMUX_SESSION naming. OUT — resumeclaude; changing CC_TMUX_SESSION semantics or instance-identity; superclaude.bat/.ps1 beyond flag parity.
**Test plan:** no automated tests because these are bash launcher wrappers. Acceptance (state as the check): (a) `bin/superclaude --help` shows 1M as the DEFAULT and names the --200k/--no-1m inverse; (b) a launched session has ANTHROPIC_MODEL=opus[1m] with no resumed history; (c) inside a launched session `echo $CC_TMUX_SESSION` is still set and context-load Step 0 resolves the instance; (d) `--new` no longer appears in rescueclaude help/handling.
**Validation (runtime):** a bare `superclaude` launch => opus[1m] + fresh conversation + CC_TMUX_SESSION still resolves the CC instance in context-load; Granny routing to CC.0 unaffected.
**Rollback:** git revert restores opt-in --1m (off by default) and the --new flag.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
**Completion criteria:** both launchers default to opus[1m] + fresh conversation with a working inverse (--200k/--no-1m); --new removed; CC_TMUX_SESSION still resolves the instance in context-load and Granny routing.
body.result: 1M context is now the default in both bin/superclaude and bin/rescueclaude via clearing CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_1M_CONTEXT (the documented kill-switch .bashrc sets =1); --200k/--no-1m is the inverse A/B lever. superclaude dropped the fragile ANTHROPIC_MODEL=opus[1m] and carries the 1M state through the fresh tmux server explicitly. rescueclaude is always-fresh (RESUME_ARGS=() unconditional), --new removed, wrong opus[1m] comment fixed. CC_TMUX_SESSION preserved. Verified: bash -n both, --help shows 1M-default + --200k, carry-branch logic correct (default clears kill-switch for claude, --200k sets it). Commit 569bf200.
body.unproven_reason: No launcher-spawn behavioral proof harness: bash wrappers have no red->green assertion form (proof_emitter can't prove shell launchers). Full end-to-end (a launched claude actually running the 1M window + fresh conversation + CC_TMUX_SESSION identity) is verified by Akien's next relaunch, not an automated test. Missing lever: a hermetic launcher-spawn harness asserting the resolved env (CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_1M_CONTEXT state, RESUME_ARGS) from a simulated launch.
